overall.description: A third-person perspective walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The character walks under an elevated highway, crosses an open intersection with futuristic vehicles, and enters a neon-lit commercial walkway. The scene features wet reflective streets, towering skyscrapers, and dense urban architecture typical of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the elevated highway, following a small group of pedestrians ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with support pillars
smooth gray concrete wall running along the left side of the walkway
building facade with green-tinted illuminated windows
tall pole with bright linear LED light fixture
yellow tactile guidance strips embedded in the concrete walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a walk beneath an elevated highway in a futuristic urban environment. The space is enclosed by concrete walls and the overhead highway deck, illuminated by artificial LED streetlights. The camera follows a small group of pedestrians along a sidewalk with yellow tactile paving strips.

events.description: approaching the end of the covered overpass, natural night sky becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward toward the open intersection, following pedestrians ahead

entered.detail: distinctive circular architectural structure visible in the distance ahead
tall glass skyscraper with illuminated spire rising against the night sky
painted road markings indicating approaching pedestrian crossing zone

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the covered walkway, transitioning from the enclosed overpass to an open intersection. A distinctive circular building structure and a tall skyscraper become visible in the distance as the artificial lighting mixes with the dark night sky ahead.

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the street
futuristic white jeep and other vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt intersection while futuristic vehicles pass by on the road

notable_agents.action: futuristic white jeep driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: white painted zebra stripes on the asphalt indicating pedestrian crossing
various futuristic cars including a white jeep and a red six-wheeled SUV
building facade with glowing red and green neon lights
rain-slicked road surface reflecting the city lights

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide open intersection beneath the night sky, crossing the wet reflective asphalt. Futuristic vehicles including a white jeep drive through the crossing, while the circular ring structure and tall skyscraper dominate the background. Neon-lit buildings become visible on the right as the character traverses the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with digital advertisements

events.description: entering covered walkway with overhead digital billboards and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered commercial arcade, passing by seated pedestrians and digital displays

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench near a planter, illuminated by neon light

entered.detail: metal grid ceiling structure covering the pedestrian walkway
large illuminated billboard displaying 'GETTING CLOSER' text and product imagery
pink neon sign with 'WET DREAM' text
illuminated vending machine with glowing interface

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered commercial walkway illuminated by vibrant neon signs and digital billboards. The space features a metal grid ceiling, concrete planters, and various advertisements including a prominent 'WET DREAM' neon sign. The environment shifts from the open street to an enclosed arcade atmosphere with mixed pedestrian traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed underpass into a wide urban intersection and finally into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial arcade. It begins beneath an elevated highway, following a group of pedestrians along a sidewalk with yellow tactile paving under artificial LED streetlights. As the camera approaches the end of the overpass, the enclosed space opens up to reveal a dark night sky and a distant circular building and skyscraper. The scene then expands into a wide intersection where the camera crosses wet, reflective asphalt alongside futuristic vehicles before turning toward a cluster of glowing buildings. Finally, the environment shifts from the open street into a covered walkway characterized by a metal grid ceiling and brilliant digital billboards, including a prominent neon sign for Wet Dream.
